item.title: Camera Pictures Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Camera Pictures Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: flashdriverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Camera Pictures Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Camera Pictures Recovery Software supports standard and raw search mechanism for users in reviving your precious moment’s photographs and save retrieved snapshots at any user defined location in your device by using distinct types of image file extensions. Digital photo salvage utility claims for short span of execution time and efforts in restoring your misplaced pictures from point and shoot camera. Digital camera data recovery software is a tool that helps users recovers lost photographs, family snaps, and other digital images from all major branded digital cameras. Software utilizes advanced disk scanning techniques like 'Advance Search', 'Standard Search', and 'Raw Search' to recover lost or inaccessible images and data.

[read more]

Digital camera data recovery software is a tool that helps users recovers lost photographs, family snaps, and other digital images from all major branded digital cameras. Software utilizes advanced disk scanning techniques like 'Advance Search', 'Standard Search', and 'Raw Search' to recover lost or inaccessible images and data.

[read more]

(Utilities)
Camera Pictures Recovery Software supports standard and raw search mechanism for users in reviving your precious moment’s photographs and save retrieved snapshots at any user defined location in your device by using distinct types of image file extensions. Digital photo salvage utility claims for short span of execution time and efforts in restoring your misplaced pictures from point and shoot camera. Digital camera data recovery software is a tool that helps users recovers lost photographs, family snaps, and other digital images from all major branded digital cameras. Software utilizes advanced disk scanning techniques like 'Advance Search', 'Standard Search', and 'Raw Search' to recover lost or inaccessible images and data.

[read more]

item.title: Disk Restore Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Disk Restore Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: diskrestore
item.itunes:summary:
Disk Restore Software
(Utilities)
Are you still searching for a reliable and cost effective utility to regain deleted pictures from crashed jump drive? Download and install most economical Disk Restore Software from www.diskrestore.org link to retrieve missing audio and video files from formatted data traveler. Software supports all major brands of pen drive including Sony, Kingston, SanDisk etc and quickly regains all lost folders. GUI based data rescue tool facilitates non technical user to easily restore multiple photographs from jump drive lost due to disk format, human error or memory crash.

[read more]

item.itunes:author: datarecoveryservice
item.itunes:summary:
SIM Card Data Recovery Service
(Utilities)
SIM Card Data Recovery Service is used to retrieve lost text messages or sms from sim card memory. Visit www.datarecoveryservice.biz site for download regain utility to revive missing contact no and name that lost due to software/hardware malfunction from cell phone sim card.

[read more]

item.title: Converseen [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: Converseen [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: faster
item.itunes:summary:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Linux[/b], [b]Windows[/b], [b]macOS[/b], [b]FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert[/b], [b]resize[/b], [b]rotate[/b], and [b]flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF[/b] document into a set of images with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+[/b] formats, set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for [b]free[/b]!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Change the format of an image or group of images simultaneously.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress one or multiple images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a batch of images

You can find more details about [b]Converseen[/b] on the [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net]official website[/url] or on [url=https://github.com/Faster3ck/Converseen]GitHub[/url]. If you enjoy this work, feel free to contribute to its development by making a donation on [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net/donate]PayPal, Ko-Fi, or using Cryptocurrencies (BTC, ETH, LTC, DOGE)[/url]!

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows 7/8/10/11[/b][/li]
[li][b]macOS 12 Monterey or later[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]
item.description:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Linux[/b], [b]Windows[/b], [b]macOS[/b], [b]FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert[/b], [b]resize[/b], [b]rotate[/b], and [b]flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF[/b] document into a set of images with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+[/b] formats, set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for [b]free[/b]!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Change the format of an image or group of images simultaneously.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress one or multiple images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a batch of images

You can find more details about [b]Converseen[/b] on the [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net]official website[/url] or on [url=https://github.com/Faster3ck/Converseen]GitHub[/url]. If you enjoy this work, feel free to contribute to its development by making a donation on [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net/donate]PayPal, Ko-Fi, or using Cryptocurrencies (BTC, ETH, LTC, DOGE)[/url]!

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows 7/8/10/11[/b][/li]
[li][b]macOS 12 Monterey or later[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Linux[/b], [b]Windows[/b], [b]macOS[/b], [b]FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert[/b], [b]resize[/b], [b]rotate[/b], and [b]flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF[/b] document into a set of images with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+[/b] formats, set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for [b]free[/b]!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Change the format of an image or group of images simultaneously.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress one or multiple images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a batch of images

You can find more details about [b]Converseen[/b] on the [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net]official website[/url] or on [url=https://github.com/Faster3ck/Converseen]GitHub[/url]. If you enjoy this work, feel free to contribute to its development by making a donation on [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net/donate]PayPal, Ko-Fi, or using Cryptocurrencies (BTC, ETH, LTC, DOGE)[/url]!

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows 7/8/10/11[/b][/li]
[li][b]macOS 12 Monterey or later[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]

item.title: Files Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Files Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: filesrecoverysoft
item.itunes:summary:
Files Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Company website www.ddiitt.com is helpful to get user friendly data revive program for retrieval of logically damaged digital pictures and other multimedia files. Simple to handle Files Recovery Software offers advance option to keep safe all retrieved files and folder at any specified location on desktop machine. How to get back removed files from corrupted pen drives? Use best featured file rescue tool to easily undelete memorable video clips, text files and other types of data from formatted USB media.

[read more]

item.title: Digital Picture Files Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Picture Files Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: flashdriverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Picture Files Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Best featured and easy to use Digital Picture Files Recovery Software provides perfect solution to retrieve your memorable moment’s images from variety to storage media by saving time and cost in just few simple mouse clicks. Innovative data restoration software is specifically devised to regain pictures files from corrupted or badly crashed USB flash drive without having any extra technical skills. Digital picture recovery software retrieves and restores deleted, formatted, or corrupted photographs, images, snapshots, and digital stills from fixed and removable media devices. Software is compatible with major removable media brands such as Sony, Samsung, Kingston, Transcend, Canon, Toshiba, SanDisk, and Hitachi.

[read more]
item.description:
Digital Picture Files Recovery Software

Digital picture recovery software retrieves and restores deleted, formatted, or corrupted photographs, images, snapshots, and digital stills from fixed and removable media devices. Software is compatible with major removable media brands such as Sony, Samsung, Kingston, Transcend, Canon, Toshiba, SanDisk, and Hitachi.

[read more]

Digital Picture Files Recovery Software

Best featured and easy to use Digital Picture Files Recovery Software provides perfect solution to retrieve your memorable moment’s images from variety to storage media by saving time and cost in just few simple mouse clicks. Innovative data restoration software is specifically devised to regain pictures files from corrupted or badly crashed USB flash drive without having any extra technical skills. Digital picture recovery software retrieves and restores deleted, formatted, or corrupted photographs, images, snapshots, and digital stills from fixed and removable media devices. Software is compatible with major removable media brands such as Sony, Samsung, Kingston, Transcend, Canon, Toshiba, SanDisk, and Hitachi.

item.title: Memory Card Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbrepair
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Company provides versatile and affordable picture salvage tool for memory card on website www.usbrepair.org that enables general users to rescue lost data from various types of memory cards like SD, XD, MM, flash card etc. Highly interactive Memory Card Recovery Software is fully capable to revive misplaced data saved in different file formats including jpg, bmp, gif, mp3, bmp, midi, wav and more. Well featured card file salvage program safely recovers files lost due to hardware/software malfunction.

[read more]
item.description:
Memory Card Recovery Software

Company provides versatile and affordable picture salvage tool for memory card on website www.usbrepair.org that enables general users to rescue lost data from various types of memory cards like SD, XD, MM, flash card etc. Highly interactive Memory Card Recovery Software is fully capable to revive misplaced data saved in different file formats including jpg, bmp, gif, mp3, bmp, midi, wav and more. Company provides versatile and affordable picture salvage tool for memory card on website www.usbrepair.org that enables general users to rescue lost data from various types of memory cards like SD, XD, MM, flash card etc. Highly interactive Memory Card Recovery Software is fully capable to revive misplaced data saved in different file formats including jpg, bmp, gif, mp3, bmp, midi, wav and more. item.title: Flash Drive Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Flash Drive Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: flashdriverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Flash Drive Data Recovery
(Utilities)
For downloading Flash Drive Data Recovery program visit following web page www.flashdrivedatarecovery.org which is used for efficient data restoration that is formatted by mistake from handy memory drives. Jump drive data regaining utility recovers erased music files such as mp3, midi, m4a, wav, aac and many more file extensions from formatted key drive in convenient manner without any technical guidance or support. Flash drive data recovery software is designed to recover lost data from major branded USB flash drives, including Pen drive, Thumb drive, Handy drive, and other pen drive storage media. Software is designed to recover corrupted or inaccessible files from virus-infected pen drives, including various file types like doc, ppt, pdf, jpg, gif, wav, mov, mp3, xls, midi, and bmp. Data retrieval software allows users to save recovered files at a specific location on their computer.

[read more]
item.description:
Flash Drive Data Recovery
(Utilities)
For downloading Flash Drive Data Recovery program visit following web page www.flashdrivedatarecovery.org which is used for efficient data restoration that is formatted by mistake from handy memory drives. Jump drive data regaining utility recovers erased music files such as mp3, midi, m4a, wav, aac and many more file extensions from formatted key drive in convenient manner without any technical guidance or support. Flash drive data recovery software is designed to recover lost data from major branded USB flash drives, including Pen drive, Thumb drive, Handy drive, and other pen drive storage media. Software is designed to recover corrupted or inaccessible files from virus-infected pen drives, including various file types like doc, ppt, pdf, jpg, gif, wav, mov, mp3, xls, midi, and bmp. Data retrieval software allows users to save recovered files at a specific location on their computer.

[read more]

For downloading Flash Drive Data Recovery program visit following web page www.flashdrivedatarecovery.org which is used for efficient data restoration that is formatted by mistake from handy memory drives. Jump drive data regaining utility recovers erased music files such as mp3, midi, m4a, wav, aac and many more file extensions from formatted key drive in convenient manner without any technical guidance or support. Flash drive data recovery software is designed to recover lost data from major branded USB flash drives, including Pen drive, Thumb drive, Handy drive, and other pen drive storage media. Software is designed to recover corrupted or inaccessible files from virus-infected pen drives, including various file types like doc, ppt, pdf, jpg, gif, wav, mov, mp3, xls, midi, and bmp. Data retrieval software allows users to save recovered files at a specific location on their computer.
